queries.question: List school from schools records full-joined with frpm, satscores.
queries.sql: SELECT "schools"."school" FROM "schools" FULL OUTER JOIN "frpm" ON "schools"."school" = "frpm"."school_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "satscores" ON "schools"."school" = "satscores"."sname";
